channel.title: Dan Patrick Show (Filtered)
channel.description: Daily DP Show episodes without C&R or Best Of clips.
channel.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3: Bruce Feldman Stops By
item.description:
Jonas Knox, Brady Quinn, & LaVar Arrington chat with Bruce Feldman on inside NFL draft intel and other draft talks. Plus, the guys give out a fine on the show, go over a possible retirement for Jimmy Garoppolo, a 1st time edition of The Leftovers, and more!

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2: Trent Wiliams Re-Signs With 49ers & OBJ Trying Out?
item.description:
Jonas Knox, Brady Quinn, & LaVar Arrington recap the 49ers re-signing Trent Williams and what that means for their team going forward. Plus, the guys ponder Odell Beckham Jr. working out for the Giants at their team facilities, Billy Donovan stepping down as Bulls HC, and more!!

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1: Steve Kerr's Warriors Tenure
item.description:
Jonas Knox, Brady Quinn, & LaVar Arrington fill in for the Dan Patrick Show as they ponder if Steve Kerr's tenure as Head Coach of the Golden State Warriors has come to an end. Plus, the guys talk about how basketball used to be back in the day as compared to how James Harden plays with all offense no defense; we have a fun edition of ICYMI, and much more! 

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – Tribute to Pittsburgh, Frank Caliendo
item.description:
Fritzy gets loose with a musical homage to Pittsburgh that you must hear to believe. And legendary impressionist Frank Caliendo drops by to entertain Dan, the Danettes and everyone who came out for the live broadcast from Pittsburgh.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – Brian Windhorst, Fernando Mendoza
item.description:
DP talks to NBA insider Brian Windhorst about Victor Wembanyama’s concussion and the rest of the NBA Playoffs. And he catches up with projected #1 pick in tomorrow’s NFL Draft, Fernando Mendoza and asks him about his plans for tomorrow night.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – Live from Pittsburgh at the NFL Draft, Jerome Bettis
item.description:
Dan and the Danettes arrive in Pittsburgh on the eve of the NFL Draft! They talk a little NBA Playoffs before getting into draft talk. Plus, Pittsburgh Steelers legend and NFL Hall of Fame RB, Jerome Bettis stops by the set.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – Kirk Herbstreit, Kurt Warner
item.description:
Legendary college football analyst Kirk Herbstreit (and his dog Peter) joins Dan in Pittsburgh and talks about assessing quarterback talent for the NFL Draft and reminisces about the Pittsburgh Pirates. Super Bowl champion and NFL analyst Kurt Warner then drops in and talks about the real reason why he can’t play quarterback anymore and talks about the art of quarterbacking, working on progressions, processing information quickly and taking hits.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – Pistons Rebound, Bill Cowher
item.description:
Dan spars with Pistons fans – should he talk about Game 1 Pistons or Game 2? Dan and the Danettes discuss the value of trading up as Notre Dame RB Jeremiyah Love rises up draft boards. Former Steelers HC and NFL analyst Bill Cowher joins Dan in Pittsburgh and talks about what it was like dealing with the city after a loss, the best player he didn’t get to draft, and spars with Dan in verbal fisticuffs as tradition.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – Draft Day Is Finally Here!, Daniel Jeremiah
item.description:
DP and the Danettes continue their road trip in Pittsburgh for the NFL Draft, and they are breaking down all the story lines as we all get ready for tonight’s eagerly anticipated action. NFL analyst Daniel Jeremiah joins Dan to discuss the rising star of Jeremiyah Love, why so many teams are targeting him, and the likely draft night plans of Cowboys’ owner Jerry Jones.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – Who Won the NFL Draft?, Matt Miller
item.description:
Dan talks about the Jets and how impressed he was with their draft class, and they debate which team had the best draft. NFL Draft analyst Matt Miller discusses how the Browns did poorly in the draft (and why he thinks it’d be fun to run them), why Jeremiyah Love went to the wrong team, and what exactly the Rams were thinking by drafting Alabama quarterback Ty Simpson.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – More NFL Draft Fallout, Tom Pelissero
item.description:
Dan reacts to NFL Draft night and a very perturbed-looking Sean McVay after the Rams drafted Alabama quarterback Ty Simpson. Jeremiyah Love spells trouble for one Cardinals running back. NFL insider Tom Pelissero joins Dan to try to break down what seems to be going on in Los Angeles with the Rams, the history of quarterbacks seeing their replacements getting drafted and the pressure facing Kirk Cousins with Fernando Mendoza landing in Las Vegas.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – NFL Draft Hangover, Louis Riddick
item.description:
Dan and the Danettes complete their NFL Draft road trip in Pittsburgh talk about Thursday night’s spectacle of the NFL Draft including that shocking move by the Los Angeles Rams that caught Dan’s sources off guard. And NFL analyst Louis Riddick joins the show to break down the draft, the possible tension between Rams coach Sean McVay and general manager Les Snead, plus why he’s happy to not repeat one element of last year’s draft with Mel Kiper.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – Worst Second Place, Best and Worst of the Weekend
item.description:
Dan and the Danettes contemplate the most disappointing second places in history after history was made at the London Marathon. Plus, they share their best and worst of the weekend.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – Steve Kerr’s Future, Gambling Do’s & Don’ts
item.description:
Dan and the Danettes talk about the controversial career of Steve Kerr and what his future might look like. And DP recalls his days as a gambler and shares some words of advice for those who place bets on sports.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – Diego Pavia Remains Undrafted, Chris Simms
item.description:
Former Vanderbilt QB and Heisman Trophy finalist, Diego Pavia did not get drafted over the weekend in a stunning rebuke from NFL teams and DP recaps an amazing weekend in Pittsburgh. Plus, DP catches up with former NFL QB Chris Simms who breaks down last weekend’s NFL Draft.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – Dan Wetzel, Gambling Horror Stories
item.description:
Senior college sportswriter Dan Wetzel says Brendan Sorsby's gambling case appears to be an NCAA issue and emphasizes how modern betting technology makes access dangerously easy. Plus, DP takes calls and the Danettes share some horror stories of gambling gone wrong.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – Athletes Gambling Is a Real Problem, Reggie Miller
item.description:
Dan dives deeper into the issues surrounding sports gambling by college athletes and considers some possible solutions. And he talks to NBA legend Reggie Miller about the first round of the NBA Playoffs and who might be the greatest duo in the history of the NBA.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – Cooper Flagg Deserved the NBA ROY, Brendan Sorsby’s Gambling Addiction
item.description:
The vote for NBA Rookie of the Year was a lot closer than DP thought it should be and he makes a case for why Cooper Flagg was the obvious choice. Plus, Dan and the Danettes discuss Texas Tech QB Brendan Sorsby entering a gambling addiction rehabilitation program and the slippery slope that is sports gambling.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – Albert Breer, Russini Redemption
item.description:
Dan talks to NFL insider Albert Breer about the drama surrounding the Rams drafting QB Ty Simpson. And DP would love to sit down with Dianna Russini and thinks a quality interview might be exactly what she needs to resurrect her career.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – Bad Teams Playing for Titles, Jamal Crawford
item.description:
Dan and the Danettes get into a discussion about the worst teams in history that were able to play for a championship despite their lack of talent. And former NBA standout Jamal Crawford drops by to talk about working with Victor Wembanyama to improve his handles and how much enjoyed breaking ankles when he was a player.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – Wemby the Ghost, Expanding the Bracket
item.description:
Dan weighs in on last night’s NBA Playoff action and thinks the NBA needs to introduce a new statistical category to account for Victor Wembanyama’s ability to discourage shots on defense. And he addresses the reports that the NCAA is planning on expanding the field of their men’s and women’s basketball tournaments to 76 teams.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – Brandel Chamblee, Vegas Growing as a Sports Town
item.description:
Golf Channel analyst Brandel Chamblee joins Dan to discuss the fall of LIV Golf and what punishment, if any, the golfers who abandoned the PGA should face in order to come back to the Tour. MLS is planning to move a team to Vegas, cementing it further as a sports town unthinkable a decade ago.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – Sean McVay Story Isn’t Going Away, Jason Kidd
item.description:
Rams head coach Sean McVay didn’t really hide his displeasure after Los Angeles drafted Alabama quarterback Ty Simpson, and Dan says the story isn’t going away anytime soon as McVay makes more media appearances. Dallas Mavericks Head Coach Jason Kidd talks about what it’s like coaching NBA Rookie of the Year Cooper Flagg, plus dishes on memories playing Michael Jordan and playing with Steve Nash.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – LIV Golf Loses Funding, Beyond Round 1
item.description:
Dan reacts to the sudden pulling of Saudi funding from LIV Golf. What does it mean for the golfers who abandoned the PGA? Dan doesn’t think they should get back in easily. LeBron can’t put away the Rockets. The first round of the NBA playoffs is noise – who can actually win it all?

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: HOUR 3 – Dan makes Derby picks, Steve Kerr didn’t hinder Draymond Green
item.description:
A lot of horse facts, stories of one-eyed horses and Kentucky Derby picks. Do horses know they’re racing? Callers make their pitch to fill in for Bad Larry on the gambling podcast. Dan continues to discuss Draymond Green’s comments that he was hindered by Warriors coach Draymond Green because he didn’t have plays drawn up for him.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: HOUR 2 – Draymond Green is deluding himself, Austin Rivers
item.description:
Dan reminisces upon covering horse racing as the Kentucky Derby looms large. Drama consumes the gambling podcast. Former NBA athlete and NBC commentator Austin Rivers joins Dan to discuss the NBA Playoffs and reacts to Draymond Green’s belief that there should have been plays drawn up for him by Steve Kerr.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: HOUR 1 – Jokic and the Nuggets bow out, Duke expands its footprint
item.description:
The first round of the NBA Playoffs have been full of surprises. Dan questions why the Denver Nuggets wanted to play the Timberwolves, and critiques Jokic as he fails to deliver – if that had been Lebron the media would kill him. Denver just feels far away and the opportunity for Jokic to win another . Duke steps outside the ACC for another game and media opportunity. Is Dan feeling the love from the University of Dayton?

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – Are Horses Athletes?, Jim Jackson
item.description:
Dan and the Danettes consider whether a horse should be considered an athlete after watching an exciting Kentucky Derby over the weekend. And NBA on Prime analyst Jim Jackson weighs in on Jaylen Brown's comments and previews the NBA Conference Semifinals.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – American Songwriters, Best and Worst
item.description:
Dan and the Danettes discuss a recently released list of the greatest living American songwriters and debate who should have been included. And they discuss the best and worst of the weekend.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – Kentucky Derby Still Slaps, Sour Grapes from Jaylen Brown
item.description:
Dan thoroughly enjoyed the Kentucky Derby over the weekend and appreciates the timelessness of the event. And he weighs in on the NBA Playoffs and Jaylen Brown’s contention that the officials have an “agenda” after the Celtics were eliminated by the Philadelphia 76ers.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick
